title: potentilla meyeri var. fenzlii
intro: Potentilla meyeri var. fenzlii, also known as Dwarf Cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Potentilla meyeri var. fenzlii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
